# Illinois Payroll Reporting

Use this screen to generate the following export files required for state-specific payroll reporting in Illinois.

- EEO Workforce Analysis Report

- Monthly Wage Electronic Export

- Quarterly Electronic Export

For more information about these export files, refer to the [Illinois Payroll Reporting Manual](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/1bfff820-8ea9-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..iQ0nZyAc3xaOq3kXM6RCrCJz0ttiD5WS_8UxXY44KjA&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Illinois_Payroll_Reporting_Manual-V14_24.pdf%22).
